objective.goal: Generate unique signatures for each test to enable tracking across runs
Add search functionality to find tests by name or file path
Enable future features like flakiness tracking and test history

success_criteria.criterion: Test signatures generated using MD5 hash of file path + test name
Search returns results for partial test names (case-insensitive)
Search returns results for partial file paths
Results sorted by run count (most frequently run first)
Test history API returns correct historical data

endpoint.description: Search tests by name or file path

testing_checklist.test: Existing test_results records get backfilled signatures
Search returns results for partial test names
Search returns results for partial file paths
Results are sorted by run count (most frequently run first)
Test history API returns correct historical data
Empty state shows when no results

implementation_prompt.next_phase: Phase 02: Date Range Filter - Enables filtering all dashboard data by date range
